entities.name: STEM BORER
entities.description: The most important pest of sorghum, scientifically known as Chilo partellus Swinhoe

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being bred for resistance to the stem borer

entities.name: STEM BORER RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infestation by the stem borer, which is quantitatively inherited

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the borer-resistant breeding lines

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the grains in borer-resistant breeding lines

entities.name: ICSV 700
entities.description: A sorghum variety that exhibits high levels of stem borer resistance

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE INHERITANCE
entities.description: The mode of inheritance where a trait is governed by multiple genes

entities.name: ADDITIVE AND NONADDITIVE GENES
entities.description: The types of genes that govern the inheritance of stem borer resistance

entities.name: EPISTATIC GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: Gene interactions that are more pronounced under artificial borer infestation

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL BORER INFESTATION
entities.description: A controlled condition of pest infestation used to study gene effects

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Effects originating from the cytoplasm that appear to be present in the resistance trait
